title: Kiub Store / Listing Cover Images
purpose: Hero / store-listing / promo cover images for every Kiub distribution surface — Chrome new tab, Opera new tab, Chrome extension (multiple variants), and the Slack app. One Figma page per surface, with the '5' frame typically being the primary Chrome Web Store hero.

sections.heading: Active pages
items: Hero/store covers for the Kiub Chrome new-tab experience. 'A new tab for what's important', dark Mt. Fuji background. Frames 1–5 are size variants; '440 x 280' is the Chrome Web Store thumbnail size.
Same new-tab hero adapted for the Opera add-on listing. 'Install now to experience a beautiful new tab'.

sections.heading: Below the ARCHIVE label
sections.subtitle: These pages sit under the ARCHIVE separator in the page list. Treat as inactive unless you confirm otherwise with the design owner.
items: Chrome extension store covers for the Lifetime-Deal version. 'Experience a beautiful new tab — Add to Chrome'.
Chrome extension covers for the Side Panel variant.
Older Chrome-extension cover set with extras: Preview, Installation Onboarding, Pro subscription (yearly/monthly), Home / Intro.
Refreshed Chrome-extension cover set — frames 1–5 plus 440x280 thumbnail.
Slack app store covers — 'Turn Slack messages into Tasks. React with bell emoji.' Variants A–E plus desktop and mobile.

not_in_file: Marketing landing pages → see 'Landing pages v0'
footer: Discoverable from Slack via the kiub-figma-index registry. Run: python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/kiub-figma-index/scripts/find.py "your query"
